name: Funny Nose Surgery
author: Poki
description: Funny Nose Surgery is a game where you have to perform a nose surgery on a girl. There are many taskt you have to complete. After finishing the surgery, you unlock the dress up part of the game!  About the creator:  Funny Nose Surgery was created by Go Panda Games. This is their fourth game on Poki after Baby Race Galaxy, Funny Zookeeper Rescue and Creative Puzzle!
